description: Style NoteNow carry your monetary essentials in style with this leather wallet from new hide. The wallets come with a stylish upper and spacious inner making it must-have accessory!Product DetailsBrown two-fold wallet with two main compartmentsMultiple card holders, insert pockets, a zippered pocket in the centre, additional flap for id card with a button closure, folding inside on the left sideBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeDimensions: 11.5 cm x 9.5 cm
